Home About Features

◉ OrbLayout

Build static sites with the simplicity of HTML and the power of components.

Why OrbLayout?

Pure HTML

No virtual DOM, no JavaScript runtime. Your pages are pure, clean HTML.

Component System

Create reusable components with props, just like modern frameworks.

Layout Engine

Define layouts once, reuse everywhere with content slots.

Lightning Fast

Build hundreds of pages in milliseconds. No bundler overhead.

Features

  • ✓ Zero runtime — pure static HTML
  • ✓ Layout system with named slots
  • ✓ Reusable components with props
  • ✓ Loops, conditionals, and variables
  • ✓ Dev server with live reload
  • ✓ Lightning fast builds
v1.0
HTML
Static
Fast
